summary: CEO Analytics Migration Testing Complete - All 3 analytics endpoints (Security, Reports, Revenue Targets) working with real PostgreSQL data. CEO Users, Reports, Security pages migrated from mock to real API. Zero ceoService imports in CEO pages.

issues: Minor HTML hydration warnings in console (span inside tr/th) - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

security_analytics_api.details: GET /api/crm/analytics/security returns alerts, risk_score, module_usage, summary. 6 alerts detected, risk_score 35/100.

reports_analytics_api.details: GET /api/crm/analytics/reports returns funnel (6 stages), loss_reasons (4 reasons), pipeline_history, metrics (active_deals=4, won_deals=1, conversion_rate=20%).

revenue_targets_api.details: GET /api/crm/analytics/revenue-targets returns weekly/monthly/annual targets computed from real MRR ($4,841 monthly current).

customer_by_id_api.details: GET /api/crm/customers/{id} returns single customer with all fields including modules_enabled.

ceo_users_page.details: CEO Users page loads 11 customers from PostgreSQL. Table shows company_name, contact_name, plan_id, mrr, status, modules_enabled, signup_date.

ceo_users_search.details: Search filters customers via API. Searching 'Bar' returns 1 result.

ceo_users_row_click.details: Clicking a row opens CrmDetailDialog in customer mode with Plan/Status dropdowns and module toggles.

ceo_reports_page.details: CEO Reports page loads real pipeline funnel from deals table. Shows 4 Active Opportunities, 1 Won, 20% Conversion Rate.

ceo_reports_loss_reasons.details: Loss reasons derived from closed_lost deal notes: Price too high 40%, Bad timing 20%, No budget 20%, Chose competitor 20%.

ceo_security_page.details: CEO Security page loads real alerts computed from customers table. Shows risk_score 35/100, 6 alerts, alert breakdown chart, module usage chart.

ceo_security_view_button.details: Active alerts list has View buttons that open CrmDetailDialog for the customer.

ceo_layout_sidebar_targets.details: Sidebar shows Weekly/Monthly/Annual revenue targets from real API data.

zero_ceoservice_imports.details: Verified: grep found ZERO imports of 'ceoService' in /app/frontend/src/pages/ceo/ and /app/frontend/src/components/ceo/

regression_pipeline.details: Pipeline page still works correctly. Shows 5 kanban columns with real deals.

regression_customers.details: Customer Base page still works correctly. Filters by status and plan work.

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing 11 customers and 10 deals from PostgreSQL.
context_for_next_testing_agent: CEO Analytics Migration complete. All 3 CEO module pages (Security, Reports, Users) now use real PostgreSQL data via /api/crm/analytics/* endpoints. CeoLayout sidebar revenue targets also use real API. CustomerDetailDialog migrated from ceoService to crmService. Zero mock data in CEO module. CeoOverview.js and CeoRevenue.js still use ceoData.js (expected, not in scope).

data_verified.deals: 10+ total (5 closed_lost, 1 lead, 1 qualified, 1 proposal, 1 negotiation, 1+ closed_won)
data_verified.alerts: 6 alerts computed from customer status and module usage
data_verified.loss_reasons: 4 reasons derived from closed_lost deal notes
